name: Centurion Pulveris
description: Fantassin lourd de première ligne portant une armure énergétique intégrale cramoisie. Son railgun antichar perfore les fortifications ennemies avec une précision chirurgicale. Marteau de la doctrine d'assaut orbital.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Heavy infantry soldier with oversized railgun anti-tank weapon, full sealed helmet with thin slit visor, standing in ruined urban wasteland.
